projects.name: MLAngles | MLOps Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-grade MLOps platform enabling data engineers and data scientists to create, deploy, and monitor machine learning operations seamlessly. Features include model versioning, experiment tracking, automated deployment pipelines, and real-time monitoring.
highlights: Deployed scalable MLOps infrastructure on AWS
Integrated MLflow for experiment tracking and model registry
Built automated CI/CD pipelines for ML model deployment
Implemented real-time model monitoring and alerting

projects.name: MLAngles | LLMOps Platform
projects.description: Advanced LLMOps platform for AI engineers focused on Large Language Model operations, fine-tuning, quantization, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), and autonomous AI agents. Supports multiple LLM frameworks and deployment strategies.
highlights: Architected RAG pipelines with vector databases
Implemented LLM fine-tuning and quantization workflows
Built AI agent orchestration with LangGraph
Optimized inference with vLLM for 60% faster responses

projects.name: Intelligent Document Processing System
projects.description: AI-powered document processing system that extracts, classifies, and analyzes information from various document formats using NLP and computer vision techniques.
highlights: Built custom NER models for entity extraction

projects.name: Real-time Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Full-stack real-time analytics dashboard for monitoring business metrics with live data streaming, interactive visualizations, and automated reporting.

projects.name: Microservices E-Commerce Backend
projects.description: Scalable microservices-based e-commerce backend with separate services for inventory, orders, payments, and user management. Containerized and orchestrated with Kubernetes.
